final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
